summary: Frontend-only test of the new Q-shift step in the Split Sleeper Practice tab (Badge 042 / PIN 1234 → /hours-of-service/split-sleeper → Practice). All 4 scenarios (SP1-SP4) pass end-to-end including the new shift-start/end question with markers rendering on the grid AFTER the user submits. Regression on Learn tab show-more-examples verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: the review-request path 'HoS → Training → module-split' doesn't match the actual route '/hours-of-service/split-sleeper' — documentation mismatch only, feature works.

Minor: SP2 shift explanation text doesn't explicitly cite §395.1(g)(1)(ii) in the shift block (it references 'Period A' only). SP1/SP3/SP4 do cite the CFR. Non-blocking — just a content consistency note.
test_credentials: Badge 042 / PIN 1234 (2-step: badge → Continue → PIN → Sign In)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Practice tab questions now have keys: q-split, q-shift (NEW twoTime), q-hours, q-violation. Shift markers [data-testid=shift-marker-start/end] render on the main EldGrid only after answers.shift is set. q-shift testids: q-shift, q-shift-start, q-shift-end, q-shift-submit, q-shift-feedback, q-shift-next. Selectable blocks in EldGrid are <g style=cursor:pointer> (no testid) — click by index order matches entry order filtered to SB/OFF.
